meaning: n.<英> 垃圾箱(=<美>ash can ,garbage can或garbage box)
examples: Another day, the woman saw his son stop and pick up a piece of orange peel, which he threw into the dustbin.
It's necessary to pick up rubbish and put it into dustbin.
Secondly, you can pick them up and throw them into a dustbin.
Labour's old values "must never be relegated to the dustbin of history", he said.
In fact, 3COM was eventually consigned to the dustbin of mature tech companies: acquisition by HP.
